name: Power of Substitution for Asset Basis Management

eligibility.description: Requires specific language in the trust instrument granting the power to substitute assets in a nonfiduciary capacity.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: By including a power to reacquire trust corpus by substituting other property of equivalent value in a nonfiduciary capacity, the grantor is treated as the owner for income tax purposes. This allows the grantor to swap low-basis assets in the trust for high-basis assets (like cash) before death to achieve a step-up in basis under Section 1014.
